switchingPerspectivesDescription: In multihanded solo, you’ll sometimes need to act from a specific investigator’s point of view. Use the eye icon in the player tabs to switch to that investigator’s perspective.
alphaWarning: This is currently being worked on. It likely doesn't work yet and you should not file bugs against it.
betaWarning: This is ready for testing but expect your games to break frequently.
betaWarningScenario: This scenario is ready for testing but expect your games to break frequently.
asIfAtChapter1Description: "As If" at a location applies for the duration of the entire card or ability, including window triggers from other cards.
asIfAtChapter2Description: "As If" at a location applies only during the resolution of the specified ability or action. Other card abilities and window triggers resolve under the actual game state.

PlayersDoNotControlStoryAssetClues.title: Players Do Not Control Story Asset Clues
PlayersDoNotControlStoryAssetClues.description: Since The Feast of Hemlock Vale players now control clues on assets they control, this has some weird interactions in this campaign so it is recommended to enable this option to exclude story assets from that rule.

UseSwarmPlaceholders.title: Use Placeholder Cards for Swarms
UseSwarmPlaceholders.description: Instead of using cards from the lead investigator's deck as swarm placeholders, generate placeholder cards that do not belong to any investigator's deck.
